---
# ── EXERCISE SHEET TEMPLATE ───────────────────────────────────────────────────
title: "TOPIC-TITLE -- Exercises"
exercise-blank-pages: true
exercise-show-sections: true
format:
  typst:
    toc: false
    papersize: a4
filters:
  - ../../shared/filters/extract-exercises.lua
---

```{=typst}
// (same inlined style block as lecture.qmd — copy from there)
// Then call:
#setup-exercises("TOPIC-KEY", "TOPIC-TITLE", "Gymnasium -- Mathematics", landscape: true)
#let p = get-palette("TOPIC-KEY")
```

{{< include lecture.qmd >}}
